title: aspidium lastii
intro: Aspidium lastii, also known as Last's fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of certain compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Aspidium lastii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support wound healing. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of a tincture or powder for various herbal preparations.
